meta.title: Hussien Essam — Frontend Developer
meta.description: Frontend developer crafting elegant interfaces for clients in Egypt, UAE, and Saudi Arabia.

hero.headline: Crafting quiet, fast interfaces for clients from Cairo to Riyadh.
hero.lede: I build product surfaces that respect the user's time — bento-grade layouts, careful typography, zero JS until you need it.

work.title: Selected work
work.subtitle: Five products I led end-to-end. Each one a different kind of hard.

about.title: About
about.body: I'm Hussien — a frontend developer based in Cairo, working with product teams across the region. I care about typography, latency budgets, and not shipping a 400KB hero animation to a 4G phone.

contact.title: Let's build something quiet and fast.
contact.lede: Reach out about a product role, freelance engagement, or just to compare notes.

footer.builtWith: Built with Next.js. Deployed on Vercel.
